title: foregroundServiceType=dataSync wrong for WebSocket relay
description: AndroidManifest.xml declares foregroundServiceType='dataSync'. dataSync is for background sync of structured data (email, calendar) and allows the OS to deprioritize/pause the service under battery saver. A persistent bidirectional WebSocket relay is not a data sync. The correct type is 'connectedDevice' (API 31+) or 'network' (API 34+). Wrong type signals incorrect intent to the OS and may result in the relay being killed under memory pressure when it should not be.
close_reason: changed foregroundServiceType and permission from dataSync to connectedDevice in AndroidManifest.xml
